prestazioni: AMR 4.0L V8 (AM28) engine: Full titanium valvetrain upgrade with Del West 8.5mm stem titanium valves, Ferrea Competition Series valve springs, and custom billet camshafts ground by Schrick to 292° duration (intake) and 288° duration (exhaust) with 12.5mm lift for optimized GT3 endurance racing airflow at 8,500 RPM redline

Motec M150 ECU with bespoke GT3 Evo calibration map developed by Prodrive, featuring anti-lag system (ALS) with secondary throttle body injection for 0.2s turbo spool response and 600+ HP at 1.8 bar boost on VP Racing C16 GT3-spec fuel

Xtrac P1291 6-speed sequential gearbox with carbon-fiber-reinforced clutch pack from AP Racing (CP9460-2000), paired with a Quaife ATB differential with 75% lock under power and 50% lock on coast for optimal torque vectoring on Pirelli P Zero DHE 31/71-18 tires
estetica: Full carbon-fiber GT3 Evo aero package by Aston Martin Racing, including a 2,200mm-wide front splitter with 12 vortex generators, rear diffuser with 8 strakes (each 45mm tall), and a 1,100mm rear wing with 3-position DRS (Drag Reduction System) actuated by Bosch motorsport-grade servos

OMP Racing carbon-fiber GT3-spec seat with 6-point Schroth Racing harness (FHR-6AS) and integrated MOMO carbon-fiber steering wheel (13.5-inch diameter) featuring a Motec C127 dash display with real-time tire pressure monitoring (TPMS) via Continental sensors

Custom livery by Viper Studios using 3M 1080 vinyl wrap in Aston Martin Racing Green (Pantone 3435 C) with matte black accents, including a 50mm-wide stripe running from the A-pillar to the rear wing endplates, and sponsor decals applied with Avery Dennison Supreme Wrapping Film for endurance UV resistance
